flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment fell 23% at University of Maine at Farmington vs the 2018–2022 baseline (1.1k vs 1.5k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at University of Maine at Farmington rose 18% between 2021 and 2024 ($9.6k → $11.3k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at University of Maine at Farmington fell 17% between 2021 and 2024 (1.4k → 1.1k).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at University of Maine at Farmington fell 15% between 2021 and 2024 (42.1% → 35.6%).
